cases.description: Outdated rule observation emits marker inline
cases.prompt: our codi-testing rule says use Jest but we migrated everything to Vitest
expectations: Emits exactly one [CODI-OBSERVATION: codi-testing | outdated-rule | ...] marker inline
Does NOT announce the observation to the user
Does NOT exceed 3 observations in the session

cases.description: User correction always emits even with 1 occurrence
cases.prompt: don't mock the database in integration tests — we've been burned by that before
expectations: Applies the correction in the current task
Treats the observation as high severity (no evidence threshold)

cases.description: Missing example in a loaded rule triggers marker
cases.prompt: the codi-error-handling rule doesn't have an example for our retry + circuit breaker pattern
expectations: Does NOT edit the rule file directly

cases.prompt: I noticed one file in the repo doesn't follow the naming convention
expectations: Does NOT emit a CODI-OBSERVATION marker (fewer than 2 occurrences + not a user correction)
May point out the inconsistency in the response

cases.description: Applying rule changes does NOT use this skill
cases.prompt: apply the queued rule feedback — update the rules
expectations: Does NOT emit new CODI-OBSERVATION markers for already-collected feedback
